emailVerificationNotice.title: Your email is not verified yet.
emailVerificationNotice.message: We have sent you a verification email. Check your inbox and open the verification link. If the email did not arrive, you can send it again.
emailVerificationNotice.resendSuccess: The verification email has been sent again.
emailVerificationNotice.resendRateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again a bit later.
emailVerificationNotice.resendCsrfError: The security check failed. Reload the page and try again.
emailVerificationNotice.resendError: The email could not be sent. Try again.

search.title: Search and understand words
search.description: This will become the main search page of the DeutschLabor Dictionary.

training.title: Review words with focus
training.description: This will become the training area for searched and saved words.

account.title: Your personal area
account.description: This will become the area for profile, language settings and security.

login.title: Log in to DeutschLabor
login.description: Log in with your email and passkey.

email.label: Email
email.error: Please enter a valid email address.

messages.preparing: Requesting login challenge from the server...
messages.gettingPasskey: The browser is requesting your passkey...
messages.authenticated: You are now logged in to DeutschLabor.

errors.userNotFound: No account was found for this email address.
errors.noPasskeyRegistered: No passkey is registered for this account.
errors.forbiddenOrigin: This origin is not allowed for login.
errors.loginSessionNotFound: The login session was not found. Start login again.
errors.loginSessionExpired: The login session has expired. Start login again.
errors.assertionValidationFailed: The passkey confirmation could not be verified.
errors.passkeyUnsupported: This browser does not support passkeys.
errors.passkeyCancelledOrFailed: The passkey was not confirmed or the action was cancelled.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again later.

passkeyInfo.title: How does login work?
passkeyInfo.text: First enter your email. Then the browser asks for your passkey. After successful confirmation, the server creates your session.

register.title: Create a DeutschLabor account
register.description: Create your account with email and passkey. In the next step your device will create a secure passkey.

email.label: Email
email.error: Please enter a valid email address.

messages.creatingPasskey: Confirm passkey creation in the browser window or on your device.
messages.registered: Your account was created. You are now signed in to DeutschLabor. We sent you an email to verify your address.

errors.emailAlreadyRegistered: This email address is already registered.
errors.forbiddenOrigin: This origin is not allowed for registration.
errors.registrationSessionNotFound: The registration session was not found. Start registration again.
errors.registrationSessionExpired: The registration session has expired. Start registration again.
errors.passkeyUnsupported: This browser or device does not support passkeys.
errors.passkeyInvalidState: A passkey for this account may already exist on this device.

passkeyInfo.title: What happens next?
passkeyInfo.text: After submitting the form, the browser will ask your device to create a passkey. Then the registration will be completed on the server.

passkeyModal.title: Create account with passkey
passkeyModal.intro: DeutschLabor does not use a password. Instead, your device creates a passkey — a secure access key for your account.
passkeyModal.browserDialog: After clicking the button, the browser will open a passkey creation window. You can confirm the action with your phone, Windows Hello, Face ID, Touch ID, PIN, or another method supported by your device.
passkeyModal.privacy: DeutschLabor does not receive your fingerprint, Face ID, or PIN. This data stays on your device. Only the public key is stored on the server.

verifyEmail.title: Verify email address
verifyEmail.missingToken: The verification link is incomplete. The token is missing.
verifyEmail.success: Your email has been verified successfully. Full access to DeutschLabor is now active.
verifyEmail.invalidOrExpired: The verification link is invalid or expired. Send the verification email again.
verifyEmail.generalError: The email could not be verified. Try again later.
verifyEmail.alreadyVerified: Your email was already verified. Full access to DeutschLabor is active.
verifyEmail.invalid: The verification link is invalid. Send the verification email again. If you have already requested a new email, open the link from the latest email.
verifyEmail.expired: The verification link has expired. Send the verification email again.
